data.html:
'use client';

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { useSession, signOut } from 'next-auth/react';

export default function DashboardPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const { data: session, status } = useSession();
  const [provider, setProvider] = useState(null);
  const [subscriptions, setSubscriptions] = useState([]);
  const [signals, setSignals] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  // Fetch user data based on role
  useEffect(() => {
    if (status === 'authenticated' && session?.user) {
      fetchData();
    } else if (status === 'unauthenticated') {
      router.push('/login');
    }
  }, [session, status, router]);

  const fetchData = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const userRole = (session?.user as any)?.role || 'subscriber';
      
      if (userRole === 'provider') {
        // Fetch provider data
        const res = await fetch('/api/user/provider');
        if (res.ok) {
          const data = await res.json();
          setProvider(data.provider);
          setSignals(data.signals || []);
        }
      } else {
        // Fetch subscriber data
        const res = await fetch('/api/user/subscriptions');
        if (res.ok) {
          const data = await res.json();
          setSubscriptions(data.subscriptions || []);
        }
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch data:', e);
    }
    setLoading(false);
  };

  const handleLogout = async () => {
    await signOut({ callbackUrl: '/' });
  };

  // Loading state
  if (status === 'loading' || loading) {
    return (
      

        
Loading...

      

    );
  }

  // Not authenticated
  if (!session?.user) {
    return (
      

        
Redirecting to login...

      

    );
  }

  const user = session.user as any;
  const isProvider = user.role === 'provider';

  // ===== PROVIDER DASHBOARD =====
  if (isProvider) {
    return (
      

        

          

            
📊 Provider Dashboard

            

              PROVIDER
              {user.name || user.email}
              
            

          

        


        

          {/* Stats Grid */}
          

            

              
Total Signals

              
{provider?.totalSignals || 0}

            

            

              
Win Rate

              
{provider?.winRate?.toFixed(1) || 0}%

            

            

              
Total Pips

              
{provider?.totalPips?.toFixed(0) || 0}

            

            

              
Subscribers

              
{provider?.subscribers || 0}

            

          


          {/* Recent Signals */}
          

            

              
Recent Signals

              
            

            {signals.length === 0 ? (
              
No signals yet. Create your first signal!

            ) : (
              

                
                    {signals.map((s: any) => (
                      
                    ))}
                  

                  
                    

                      Pair
                      Direction
                      Entry
                      SL
                      TP
                      Status
                    

                  
                  

                        {s.pair}
                        
                          
                            {s.direction}
                          
                        
                        {s.entryPrice}
                        {s.stopLoss}
                        {s.takeProfit1}
                        
                          
                            {s.status}
                          
                        
                      

                

              

            )}
          


          {/* Quick Actions */}
          

            
Quick Actions

            

              
                📈 Manage Signals
              
              
                ✏️ Edit Profile
              
            

          

        

      

    );
  }

  // ===== SUBSCRIBER DASHBOARD =====
  return (
    

      

        

          
📈 My Dashboard

          

            SUBSCRIBER
            {user.name || user.email}
            
          

        

      


      

        {/* Stats Grid */}
        

          

            
Active Subscriptions

            
{subscriptions.filter(s => s.status === 'active').length}

          

          

            
Signals Received

            
{subscriptions.reduce((acc, s) => acc + (s._count?.signals || 0), 0)}

          

        


        {/* Subscriptions */}
        

          

            
My Subscriptions

            
              + Find Providers
            
          

          {subscriptions.length === 0 ? (
            

              No subscriptions yet. Browse providers to get started!
            

          ) : (
            

              {subscriptions.map((sub: any) => (
                

                  

                    
{sub.provider?.displayName || 'Provider'}

                    

                      Expires: {new Date(sub.endDate).toLocaleDateString()}
                    

                  

                  
                    {sub.status}
                  
                

              ))}
            

          )}
        


        {/* Quick Actions */}
        

          
Quick Actions

          

            
              🔍 Browse Providers
            
            
              🏠 Go Home
            
          

        

      

    

  );
}
